title: COO heartbeat
summary: Friday checkpoint — marketing cleared CEO's trigger; engineering missed sprint entirely. RT-4 findings still pending at heartbeat time.
contextSummary: Reddit activated with signals-2026-04-17.md + 5 comment drafts. TikTok shipped 2 carousels (HTML). App-dev 0/4 stories, 0/2 started, OB-2 dry run never ran. PM ratified OB-7, OB-3 resized M→L. Existing Friday review in operations/index.md was written by an earlier heartbeat today and is accurate — I skipped duplicating it and focused on closing open action loops via targeted messages to CTO, Reddit researcher, and CEO.
